response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and one stint with high-throughput systems at Sociomantic, but the resume shows no exposure to experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry frameworks, or statistical/measurement work that are central to this Principal-level Growth role. Career trajectory (Senior/Staff at mid-size companies) and breadth-over-depth profile do not match an IC6 platform-builder expected to architect cross-team experimentation systems and influence multiple product orgs.
strengths: 13+ years across JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D with full-stack and embedded breadth
Prior high-scale, low-latency service experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s)
Demonstrated technical leadership via talks, workshops, founding GISCollective, and TDD/CI advocacy
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or metrics-platform experience anywhere on the resume
No evidence of multi-region, globally distributed high-availability systems at Principal scale
Title and scope (Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies) below IC6 bar; lacks cross-org platform ownership signals

key_factors.factor: Scope and seniority below IC6 expectations
Broad polyglot engineering experience with high-throughput exposure
